name: Buttermilk Chocolate-Hazelnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the buttermilk, safflower oil, egg whites, and vanilla extract. Beat together with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. In another bowl, combine the light brown sugar, whole wheat pastry flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Sprinkle the dry ingredients into the wet mixture a bit at a time, beating in with the mixer until velvety smooth.
5. Lightly oil a 9-inch cake pan. Sprinkle the bottom with flour.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan, then sprinkle evenly with half of the chopped hazelnuts.
7. Pour the remaining batter and topping the remaining hazelnuts into the pan.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
